original text:
I intend to use K for automatic use, and later have a small partner private letter, so it took some time to adjust the movement of the TDA skeleton.
The specific description is in the distribution compression package, so please be sure to check the instructions when using.
Because the author's native language is Chinese, you need to use google translation to view the instructions.
I hope to get all kinds of usage feedback, this is really important to me.
Thank you for sharing!
